name: Vispo - The Video Spot the Difference game.
short_description: Spot Differences in videos. Simples. A new twist on the old favourite.
detailed_description:
Embark on a spot the difference adventure like never before with Vispo – where the classic game meets the excitement of videos!

Travel through real and imaginary worlds, exploring beautiful scenes in movies and videos. With over 160 levels and 20,000 unique frames, the fun never ends.

Zoom in with your gamepad or mouse, spot the differences, and tap them. No time limits, just pure enjoyment. Need help? Picture hints are there for the trickier puzzles.

Worried about progress? Scores are saved to the cloud, allowing seamless play across multiple devices.

Revolutionize your spot the difference experience – Vispo is not just a game; it's a whole new level of fun! Start spotting now and see the difference for yourself.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Hungarian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Swedish, Turkish, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian
